news.t: Active Traders Shift Attention to Asia-Pacific Region

holdings.infoBox: IPAC is an equity ETF with a total of 1388 individual holdings. The top holdings are BHP Group stock at 2.52%, Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group at 2.32%, Tokyo Electron at 2.18%, Commonwealth Bank of Australia at 2.06%, and Kioxia Holdings at 1.91%.

overview.description: The iShares Core MSCI Pacific ETF (IPAC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Pacific IMI index, a market-cap-weighted index of developed Pacific securities. IPAC was launched on Jun 10, 2014 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Active Traders Shift Attention to Asia-Pacific Region
data.text: Equities across the Asia-Pacific region look poised to move higher due to well-defined risk/reward setups.
